name: The Very Idle Game
short_description: The most satisfying idle clicker game in the world
detailed_description:
The Very Idle Game is the best overpriced idle clicker game in the world. Yes, it is. Buy generators with only speed and power upgrades available. Nothing extra but it's enough to have fun.

Though the prestige system is breathtaking indeed. Invest points into various upgrades to get permanent power ups. You can refund all points anytime, so don't be afraid to experiment.

What else? Super cool permanent extra bonuses, achievements, statistics and global leaderboard.

SUPER GAMEPLAY

Click click click or just wait for passive income

SUPER PRESTIGE

Very nice permanent upgrades with powerful effects

SUPER EXTRA

Wonderful bonus upgrades that encourage you to keep playing

SUPER SOCIAL STUFF

Cool achivements and globals leaderboard to dominate everyone

SUPER GRAPHICS AND MUSIC

Amazing pixel graphics and background music

The Very Idle Game is a masterpiece indeed. There's nothing more to add. So stop reading and just buy it!
